problem_structure.unknown: which of the three clauses in the compound patient-file release condition actually binds
data: files stamped REQUEST PENDING — CONDITION UNMET
the compound release paragraph with three clauses
the featureless central panel on the far wall
the abandoned wrong-approach arrangements: size-sorted piles, categorical grid, and inventory notes
problem_structure.condition: a patient file may be released only if next-of-kin consent, a low balance, and a physician countersignature all hold

correct_approach: Wanjiku split the compound condition into individual clauses, tested each one alone by covering the others with her hand, identified the binding clause, and touched the panel; the gate opened.
